sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, date '2021-01-01');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (2, date '2022-03-15');
SELECT id, event_date, week(event_date) AS week_num FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = date '2022-07-25' WHERE id = 1;
